challenge.explanation: Da biste odgovorili na ovo pitanje, pročitajte e-mail, posebno dijelove navedene u pitanju. Ovde, treba da pročitate prvi pasus i pokušate da otkrijete zašto klijent piše Mariji. Pronađite razlog pisanja kako biste tačno odgovorili na pitanje.
challenge.instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje se nalazi ispod.

questions.text:
Ono što čitaš sada je e-mail koji je klijent poslao Mariji:

Subject: Issues with Latest Update

Dear Maria,

I hope you're doing well. I wanted to reach out regarding the latest update. Unfortunately, I've noticed that some features aren't working as expected. Specifically, the search function seems significantly slower than before, and some buttons are unresponsive.

These issues are affecting our workflow, and I'm concerned about the impact on overall user experience. Could you please look into this and let me know if a fix is possible soon? Keeping me updated on any progress would be greatly appreciated.

Looking forward to your response.

Best regards,

Brian Richards

Vice-President at Epsilon Corp Ltd.

Prema prvom pasusu, o čemu piše korisnik?

answers.answer: Kuhusu kuanzisha mkataba mpya na kampuni ya Maria.
O isporuci koja je primila pogrešnu putanju podataka.
U vezi sa pozivom/pozivnicom za posetu klijentovim kancelarijama.
answers.feedback: Klijent je pozvao Mariju da poseti zgradu njene kompanije.

challenge.title: Vežbanje 120
